features.evidence: My main wish is for more onboard memory at this price,16GB works, but headroom would help for heavier multitasking and creator workflows If you can live with the slightly off-center keyboard and wish for a bit more RAM, it’s a compelling pick for a bright, color-rich portable that pulls double duty for work and play

Setup was quick (about 30 minutes), Windows Hello face sign-in worked right away, and overall responsiveness has been snappy I don't often play AAA games upon release, most of what I play is a year or more old

OLED brightness is great, but you may want to set up battery and display profiles to balance battery life vs Screen - 5 starsKeyboard - 4 starsTrackpad - 3 starsAI deployment - 1 starThis is sold as an AI laptop but Microsoft’s AI features in windows consume so much RAM that 16 gigs are running at 80-90% most of the time

For gaming, I saw smooth performance in Helldivers on low–medium settings ProsStunning, very bright 16" OLED, fantastic for games and creative workQuick, easy setup; Windows Hello face unlock works smoothlyResponsive performance; plays Helldivers at low–medium settings without issuesHandles 3D scanning/processing well for project workPremium build and feelConsKeyboard feels slightly off-center (minor adjustment period)Would benefit from more RAM for the priceFans can ramp under load (expected with gaming/creator tasks)Potential drawbacks/concernsIf you plan to run heavy creative suites plus many browser tabs, consider a higher-RAM configuration or be mindful of memory use

I've tried out a few streaming programs and web-based ones and everything plays well and sounds acceptable All the other basic tasks work as expected - Meet/Teams/Zoom work - the camera resolution is fine and no one has complained about the audio yet
